data.title: Greenberg Traurig appoints Jonathan Temps as a shareholder in Chicago, expanding Private Funds Group and Real Estate Practice.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Greenberg Traurig, LLP, a global law firm, announced the expansion of its Private Funds Group by welcoming Jonathan Temps as a new shareholder in Chicago. This addition aims to strengthen the firm's Global Real Estate Practice. Temps, previously from another organization, will bring valuable expertise to the team.

data.title: Casey's to report Q3 fiscal 2026 results on March 9th, with earnings call on March 10th at 7:30am central time.
data.description: In Ankeny, Iowa, Casey’s General Stores, Inc. (Nasdaq: CASY), a top convenience store chain in the U.S., is set to release its third quarter fiscal 2026 figures post-market closure on March 9th, 2026. For a detailed review, Casey’s will conduct a conference call and webcast on the following day, March 10th, at 7:30am central time. The live event can be accessed through a webcast on Casey's website under the Investor Relations section at https://investor.caseys.com/.

data.title: Ormat Technologies signs geothermal PPA with NV Energy to power Google in Nevada with up to 150MW capacity by 2030.
data.description: Ormat Technologies (ORA) has seen a rise in shares after announcing a long-term geothermal Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with NV Energy to support Google's operations in Nevada. The agreement involves Ormat developing multiple geothermal projects in Nevada, expected to generate up to 150 megawatts of new geothermal capacity between 2028 and 2030. The contract spans 15 years after the final project achieves commercial operation, aligning with NV Energy's Clean Transition Tariff and supporting clean and reliable electricity investments. The agreement awaits approval by the Public Utilities Commission of Nevada, expected in the second half of 2026. The information is sourced from Benzinga.com.

data.title: AI company Chronicle Studios partners with illustrator Teo Skaffa to create YA webtoon series "Graveheart Keep" using AI for social growth and monetization.
data.description: In San Francisco, Chronicle Studios has collaborated with Teo Skaffa to introduce Graveheart Keep, his inaugural Webtoon series. By leveraging AI technology, the partnership aims at boosting social engagement and revenue generation for the series.

data.title: Kathy Leckey from Lincoln Investment to join FSI Board of Directors for 2026. Leading advocacy group in financial services.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Lincoln Investment Planning, LLC (Lincoln Investment) based in Fort Washington, Pennsylvania revealed that Kathy Leckey, the President and Chief Operating Officer, will be joining the Financial Services Institute (FSI) Board of Directors for the year 2026. FSI is a prominent advocacy group within the financial services industry. This move signifies Leckey's increasing influence within the sector and her appointment to a key leadership position.

data.title: Mill Creek named 2025 Best Property Management Firm by NAHB for innovative tech use, improving resident exp. BOCA RATON, Fla., Feb 19, 2026.
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida on February 19, 2026, Mill Creek Residential unveiled its groundbreaking use of technology to enhance the experience of residents and associates. The company, renowned for its development, ownership, and management of high-quality rental properties throughout the United States, shared their latest achievement.

data.title: Scamnetic drops trade secret claims against BlackCloak, shifts focus to false advertising.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, Scamnetic, Inc. has recently made a significant announcement. The company has decided to withdraw its trade secret claims against BlackCloak. Instead, Scamnetic will shift its focus towards broader accusations of false advertising. This decision comes after a thorough process of examining documents and testimonials from BlackCloak's executives. The review also involved assessing BlackCloak's software in the context of the legal dispute. Through this discovery phase, it became evident that there are notable differences between the services offered by BlackCloak and Scamnetic's own acclaimed identity verification platform, IDevery.

data.title: Concord Technologies marks 30 years in healthcare innovation, driving data interoperability and care delivery.
data.description: Concord Technologies, a leading company in the healthcare industry, is commemorating three decades of groundbreaking innovation and excellence in the field. The company has been at the forefront of facilitating genuine data interoperability and improving care delivery throughout its 30-year journey. This milestone underscores Concord Technologies' unwavering commitment to pushing the boundaries of technology to enhance healthcare services.

data.title: MicroGrid Networks received strategic investment from Palisade Infrastructure for battery energy storage systems in New York City.
data.description: MicroGrid Networks, LLC (MGN), a prominent entity in battery energy storage systems in New York City, has recently finalized a key investment deal. Palisade Infrastructure, alongside SER Capital Partners, has provided crucial backing to MGN to aid its expansion in New York City and nearby areas. This strategic investment is set to invigorate MGN’s growth and propel it to the next stage. The collaboration with Palisade offers MGN access to heightened capital and resources, fostering its development in the region.

data.title: iMused debuts song "The Bag" written by CLEO-P using Arya Starr's DNA as muse, highlighting ethical model with transparent royalties.
data.description: iMused, a flagship platform, is highlighting its ethical approach by promoting creator-led songwriting and offering transparent royalties and credit to the "Muse" whose DNA influences the sound. The platform, launched in Houston on Feb. 19, 2026, is supported by the social impact venture 144K Collective and has received backing from 9th Ward.

data.title: Cloud Haircare expands retail presence with Amazon, CVS, H-E-B, Giant Eagle, and upcoming Sally Beauty launch.
data.description: Cloud Haircare has recently announced an expansion of its retail presence through partnerships with major retailers. This includes collaborations with Amazon, CVS, H-E-B, and Giant Eagle. In addition, Cloud Haircare is set to launch in Sally Beauty stores. This update was issued on 19-Feb-2026 by CLOUD over PR Newswire.

data.title: NexusTek improves its Private Cloud with Nutanix, offering a cost-stable alternative to VMware. DENVER, Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: NexusTek has recently unveiled upgrades to its NexusTek Private Cloud, now utilizing Nutanix hyperconverged infrastructure to offer VMware customers a clear and dependable route to a contemporary private cloud solution. This move aims to enhance reliability and streamline the transition process for users. The announcement was made in Denver on February 19, 2026.

data.title: Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RCAT) to ring Nasdaq bell on Feb 20 before Innovation Day event.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RCAT), a leading U.S.-based company specializing in advanced all-domain drone and robotic solutions for defense and national security, shared news that their Chief Operating Officer, Christian Ericson, is set to ring the Opening Bell at the Nasdaq Stock Exchange at 9:30 a.m. ET on February 20, 2026.

data.title: Taco Bueno launches loyalty app, offers free Muchacho & introduces Bueno Bucks rewards program. Earn 10 Bucks for every $1.
data.description: In Dallas, Taco Bueno has introduced its new mobile app, which includes the brand's inaugural loyalty program. This marks a significant move for the company as it aims to improve customer experience and offer enhanced rewards for dedicated patrons. Through the Bueno Bucks program on the app, customers can now accumulate 10 points for every dollar spent on their beloved Tex-Mex dishes. This initiative represents Taco Bueno's dedication to recognizing and appreciating their loyal clientele in a more substantial manner.
